title: Muttu Muttu Lyrics Vaanavil (The Quest)
stanzas: <div>Muttu Muttu Song Lyrics TeeJay Ft MC SAI & SriMathumithaSingers: Teejay, Mc Sai, Sri Madhumitha

unai angae kangiren
un pakkavam varavaa
yaar evarendru
theriyavillai
irundhaalum palagalaam (2)

muttu muttu
enna muttu
idichi pora
enna vittu
kuzhandhai pola
kulapadi kaattu

yaar indha thaavani
nethiyila irukkudhu pottu
adhukkum keela kalla sirippu
moththathula
unakindha paattu
vaa vandhu aadu nee

Munjenmam unnai
paartha niyabagam
emmanasil nee
iruppadhu nichchiyam

anbae envaana
kuthu vizhakkae
ennai vara vaithaai

un azhagai kandu
muttinen indru
ennai kollai kondaai

aadi paadi nee kondaadu
jodi seralaam ennodu
kayya pudichiko anbodu
nee vaa

muttu muttu
enna muttu
idichi pora
enna vittu
kuzhandhai pola
kulapadi kaattu

yaar indha thaavani
nethiyila irukkudhu pottu
adhukkum keela kalla sirippu
moththathula
unakindha paattu
vaa vandhu aadu nee

ah suriyan irangi
..vilundha verum vaanam
mellena veesum kaattru
saaragal thoovi thoorum
ippellaam aasaigal
adhu mela varuvadhillai
unmela aasa vachchen
sollu penne enna dhinam

muttu muttu
enna muttu
unnudaya vetkam vittu
paarva sottu enna thottu
pookkadhadi poovin mottu

vaadi en inba raani
thaagathukku thanni kodu
konjam ne vetkam vittu
enakulla vittu  kodu

maaman naan poothiruukken
..pola kaathirukken
kedikaaram kaathu nikka
unna enna sethu vaika paru
yen sundhari
kovakaara ponnu nee
mella vandhu kattipudi
varungaala manaivi

muttu muttu enna muttu
unnoda vetkam vittu
maamana muttu
unadhu nethi naduvula
sticker pottu
yaar indha thaavani

mella mella paarthae
unai ishta pattu
naanum rasithaen

enakulla kaetten
nee enakaaga vandhava
thaane kaetten

unnavida azhagi nee illa
irundhaalum neethaan azhagu
thalli ninnu rasikkuren unna
pakkam vara bayama irukku

aadi paadi nee kondu
jodi seralaam ennodu
kayya pudichiko anbodu
nee vaa..
vaa vaa vaa

muttu muttu enna muttu
muttu muttu
idichi poren stylea paarthu
kuzhandha pola
kolapadi kaattu.

unkkaa inga vaayaa
un manasukulla irukkura ponnu
yaarunnu sollu sollu
ishta pattu unkindha songu
sa re ga ma ga re sa..
muttu muttu enna muttu..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Muttu Muttu?

The song conveys a playful and energetic vibe, celebrating joy and dance.

In which movie is Muttu Muttu featured?

The song is part of the album Vaanavil (The Quest).

Who are the singers of Muttu Muttu?

The song features vocals by MC Sai, Sri Madhumitha, and Teejay.

When was Muttu Muttu released?

The song was released on November 5, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Muttu Muttu is a vibrant celebration of life and dance, perfectly encapsulating the spirit of joy and togetherness. With its catchy lyrics and upbeat rhythm, it invites listeners to let loose and enjoy the moment. The collaboration between MC Sai, Sri Madhumitha, and Teejay adds a unique flavor, making it a standout track. This song is ideal for parties and celebrations, evoking feelings of happiness and energy.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Muttu Muttu brings an electrifying vibe with its infectious beats and lively vocals from the talented trio of MC Sai, Sri Madhumitha, and Teejay. This track from Vaanavil (The Quest) is sure to get you on your feet and dancing. Experience the unique collaboration that makes this song a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: I see you there, but I don't know who will come to you, even if I stay here, it's all a mystery.
What is this kiss? It feels like a child throwing a tantrum.
Who is this person in the mirror? Put on a smile and come dance to the song meant for you.
When I see you, I remember you, it's certain that you are in my thoughts.
Oh beloved, you have made me shine like a light.
Seeing your beauty, I am captivated today.
You dance and sing, let's join together, hold my hand and come with love.
What is this kiss? It feels like a child throwing a tantrum.
Who is this person in the mirror? Put on a smile and come dance to the song meant for you.
Ah, the sun is setting, the gentle breeze is blowing, all these desires won't come true, tell me dear, what is my day like?
What is this kiss? Let go of your worries and look at me, like a flower blooming.
Come, my sweet queen, give me some water for my thirst, let go of your worries and give me your heart.
I am waiting for you, like a flower waiting to bloom, come and give me your love.
What is this kiss? Let go of your worries and look at me, like a flower blooming.
Slowly, slowly, I have started to like you too.
I ask you, did you come for me?
Even if you are not beautiful, you are still beautiful to me, I am afraid to come near you.
You dance and sing, let's join together, hold my hand and come with love.. come, come, come.
What is this kiss? I am throwing a tantrum like a child, showing off my style.
Tell me who is the girl in your heart, sing your favorite song, sa re ga ma ga re sa..
What is this kiss?
